content: Complaints about AI log/security analysis: hallucination rated the top adoption challenge (51% 'very/extremely challenging' in one survey); CISOs distrust AI analysts drawing conclusions not matching evidence; automation bias causes plausible-but-wrong output to be acted on; AI 'fixes symptoms rather than problems'; false-positive fatigue causes engineers to ignore/suppress warnings. Implication: evidence-linked claims, visible confidence + reasoning, and honest 'unexplained signals' sections are what earn trust; confident unsupported narrative is the anti-feature.
